creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
(In reply to Greg Rivers from comment #6)

In my case I have the following key differences:

- FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p5
- FreeBSD Base and all Ports are built on my system
- openssl-1.1.1n,1 from Ports (Base OpenSSL is also installed)
- not using saslauthd, but cyrus-sasl-2.1.28 with cyrus-sasl-sql-2.1.28 and directly connecting to a MariaDB database.

More details will follow in an other comment later, as I first would like to do some more comparing and testing.
